## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (shellcheck on all .sh files)
- [ ] `make test` passes (BATS test suite, 150 tests)
- [ ] `bash -n` syntax validation passes on all scripts
- [ ] Tested on at least one supported distro/DE combination
- [ ] Configuration changes documented in `nudge.conf` comments
- [ ] New lib/ modules have corresponding test file in tests/
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths hardcoded
